channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iran’s future will be determined by Iranians, not Trump, officials say
item.description: Ghalibaf says Iran's fate will not be decided by 'Epstein's gang' as Trump pushes for role in choosing supreme leader.

item.title: CCTV video captures moment strike lands next to boys’ school in Iran
item.description: CCTV video showing the moment a missile struck next to a boys’ school in Iran’s Qazvin.

item.title: Iran shares video of Tehran primary school after attack
item.description: A school in Tehran has been struck in US-Israeli attacks, according to Iranian Ministry of Foreign Affairs spokesperson.

item.title: Video shows explosions near Tehran’s Azadi Tower
item.description: A video has been released showing huge explosions near Tehran’s Azadi Tower.

item.title: Calls grow for independent probe into deadly Iranian girls’ school attack
item.description: 'No excuse for killing girls in a classroom,' UN experts say, amid push for justice after Minab primary school assault.

item.title: White House posts ‘American justice’ video days after Iran school attack
item.description: The White House is facing criticism for posting a video montage mixing footage from the Iran war with cartoons.

item.title: Has Donald Trump failed to sell the Iran war to the world?
item.description: Some of Washington's allies have been critical and will not join the conflict.

item.title: Thousands of Syrian refugees flee Lebanon after Israeli strikes
item.description: Thousands of Syrian refugees are fleeing Israeli strikes across Lebanon and trying to return to Syria.

item.title: Kurdish opposition mulls whether to trust Trump after Iran uprising call
item.description: Iranian Kurds weigh risks of fighting government, uncertain of US and Israeli support for any uprising.

item.title: ‘No deal with Iran except unconditional surrender,’ Trump says
item.description: US president stakes out maximalist war aims as conflict wreaks havoc across the region amid rising death toll.
